infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use location to detect parking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We use location in background to detect parking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Allow Parksphere to detect your parking spots automatically even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Parksphere uses Bluetooth to detect when you connect to your car's system for more accurate parking detection.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Parksphere uses Bluetooth to detect when you connect to your car's system.

plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Parksphere to detect your parking spots automatically even when the app is in the background.

plugins.NSMotionUsageDescription: Parksphere uses motion data to automatically detect when you are driving or walking to identify parking spots.
